title: Volume Bubbles Pro v7.3 [R2D2]

summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Volume Bubbles Pro v7.3 [R2D2] by R2D2_4Life.
🐳 Volume Bubbles Pro v7.3 Welcome to the professional suite for volume-based analysis.
Volume Bubbles Pro v7.3 is designed to strip away the noise of standard volume bars and highlight where the "Smart Money" (Whales) are actually stepping into the market.
